# Session Summary — 2026-06-25 12:00:00

Summary

- Removed `S3_BACKUP_PREFIX` configuration and related behavior. Backups now always store objects under `<backup-bucket>/<source-bucket>/<original/path>`.
- Renamed configuration prefix `s3-reconciliation` -> `s3` and updated consumer configuration files accordingly.

Decisions made

- Do not use a prefix inside the backup bucket; only the backup bucket is required.
- `S3ReconciliationService` now forms backup keys as `<source-bucket>/<key>`.

- Use `s3` as the root configuration prefix for S3-related properties (renamed from `s3-reconciliation`).

Files changed

- consumer/src/main/java/io/iterating/s3/consumer/config/S3ReconciliationProperties.java
- consumer/src/main/java/io/iterating/s3/consumer/service/S3ReconciliationService.java
- consumer/src/test/java/io/iterating/s3/consumer/service/S3IsolationServiceTest.java
- consumer/src/main/resources/application.yml
- consumer/build/resources/main/application.yml
- README.md

Validation performed

- Ran `./gradlew :consumer:test` — BUILD SUCCESSFUL
- Ensured no remaining references to `S3_BACKUP_PREFIX` in the repo
